stdout: {"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place by replacing the assumed slack witness with an explicit uniform baseline construction, adding discharged core lemmas for the interior regression branch and the localized fuzzy HOIF branch, rewiring the sharp lower-bound and all-beta lower-floor DAG dependencies to those lemmas, and updating the frontier prose fields to reflect the delivered unrestricted-class rho_n lower bracket and the remaining beta<alpha sharpness gap.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to resolve every D0.5 finding: removed the redundant beta>=alpha restriction from thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound and propagated the broader all-beta scope to prop:oracle-regime-reduction; rewrote the theorem/proposition proof_tex and per-statement justification/gap/consumer so the delivered result is positioned honestly as the oracle lower branch, with rho_n matching only after the s>=d/4 reduction; demoted def:beta-frontier-handle into a route marker rather than a settled converse object; updated oeq:full-beta-frontier and the top-level tldr/project_justification/honest_scope prose to match that scope; and verified the edited JSON passes the structural gate with requireDischarged=true.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Patched core.json in place to fix the directed finding at oeq:full-beta-frontier: removed the unsupported Bonvini-Kennedy upper-comparator sentence from proof_tex, rewrote the OEQ statement/justification/gap/consumer so the scope argument now relies only on declared core dependencies (the all-beta lower bracket, the s>=d/4 rho_n identity, and the beta-frontier route marker), and validated that the edited file is valid JSON.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Overwrote the core in place to resolve all D0.5 findings: strengthened thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound and prop:oracle-regime-reduction to the all-beta oracle lower floor actually proved; fixed lem:oracle-dose-regression-lower-all-beta so its constant explicitly depends on the slack baseline; introduced the explicit upper-side class P^{BK}_{alpha,beta,s}(M,c_0,epsilon_0,t_0) plus a membership lemma to align the imported Bonvini-Kennedy upper bound with the exact-match node; rewrote lem:matched-smooth-covariate-hoif-pair and lem:full-beta-frontier-certified-partial to state exactness only on that aligned class in the easy subregime beta >= alpha, s >= d/4; and revised the open-question and top-level prose fields (tldr / project_justification / interpretation / honest_scope) so the note now advertises only the certified partial frontier and leaves the unrestricted frontier explicitly open.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to resolve every cited D0.5 finding: made the BK upper-side class explicit rather than citation-opaque, generalized def:minimax-risk to a class-parameterized object, removed the unsupported BK-subclass membership/lower-bound path, rewrote the BK-side smooth-covariate node as an upper-side comparator collapse instead of an exact minimax match, repaired the all-beta frontier summary and open question scope, added the missing Bernoulli-KL dependency to the oracle lower-bound lemma, updated dependent proof_tex and prose fields to advertise only the certified unrestricted oracle lower floor plus imported upper-side comparator, and revalidated JSON plus dependency closure.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Removed the unused provisional regime assumption ass:beta-dominates-alpha, respecified thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound as the all-beta oracle lower floor actually proved by the frozen-pi two-point construction, updated prop:oracle-regime-reduction and oeq:full-beta-frontier to state the remaining rho_n comparison honestly, and revised the top-level/prose fields so the note no longer advertises a matched Bonvini-Kennedy converse outside the s>=d/4 collapse. The edited core parses and re-passes the structural gate with requireDischarged=true.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to discharge all four D0.5 findings: the main theorem now cites the lower-bound lemma only at the level stated; the baseline-submodel-slack assumption and both oracle lower-bound proofs now explicitly use the outcome-channel slack via a symmetric two-point radius; the beta-frontier handle is recast as an explicitly open bookkeeping handle with certified lower-side content only; and the smooth-covariate reduction plus note-level prose now state only a lower-side same-scale comparison, not matched minimax sharpness.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Strengthened thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound to the all-beta oracle floor, replaced the unsupported all-beta HOIF upper re-derivation with a scoped published-source upper branch in the beta>=alpha regime, added explicit testing/source lemmas to discharge the Le Cam reduction, and rewrote the frontier/open-question/prose fields so only the supported smooth-covariate sharp case is claimed.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to make the delivered result honest on the original Holder class: added the missing def:theta-functional dependency to thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound; rewrote lem:same-class-hoif-upper-all-s as an isolated Bonvini-Kennedy source-scope comparator with the omitted extra upper-side conditions made explicit; propagated that scope correction through lem:same-class-hoif-upper-smooth-covariates, lem:frontier-bracket-all-s, lem:smooth-covariate-sharp-frontier, oeq:full-beta-frontier, and def:beta-frontier-handle; and updated the top-level prose fields (tldr, related_work, honest_scope) so the certified kernel is the universal lower floor plus open upper-side frontier rather than an overstated same-class sharp theorem.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/stat_dose_response_minimax/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Aligned def:holder-dose-class with the reproduced observed-law lower-bound argument by removing the redundant causal clauses from the class carve-out, updated the theta interpretation and lower-bound proofs to treat consistency/ignorability as an identification overlay only, rewrote def:beta-frontier-handle and the frontier prose to present an all-beta oracle-floor status note rather than a completed beta-frontier theorem, strengthened lem:same-class-hoif-upper-all-s to state explicitly that rho_n achievability is external-only and not derived from the primitive Holder class, and revised lem:smooth-covariate-sharp-frontier to state only the proved same-scale lower-floor comparison R_n >= c rho_n rather than a sharp frontier.
